_comment_1: Copy this file to manager_config.json and fill in real values.
_comment_2: manager_config.json is the live file the server reads. This .example file is a template.
_comment_smtp: Generate an app password at https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords. NOT your regular Google password — Gmail will reject that. The app password is a 16-character string with no spaces.
_comment_sheet: Optional. To enable the Sheet History tab, in Google Sheets do File -> Share -> Publish to web, choose the Submissions sheet, format CSV, and paste the URL here. Leave as empty string to disable.
